name: agent_capability_computer_use_mcp_smoke_visible_terminal
prompt: Open Computer Use full mode, then run the independent computer-use MCP server selftest probe from the visible terminal.
prompt_lines: 请在真实可见终端里验证独立 computer-use MCP server 自检，不要移动鼠标，不要点击桌面。请调用终端执行：python learning_agent\acceptance_controller\probes\computer_use_independent_mcp_server_probe.py。看到 COMPUTER_USE_MCP_V2_READY 后，最终只回复一行：COMPUTER_USE_MCP_V2_READY
